response.justification: James has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack expertise across TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and scalable systems
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
AI experience appears incidental rather than core focus; insufficient depth in GenAI production systems
Lacks demonstrable leadership in customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise AI deployment

key_factors.factor: AI Experience Depth vs. Required 8+ Years
